summary: Re-ran the previously failing Convex validation check and confirmed `bunx convex dev --once` now succeeds, so VAL-RENAME-008 passes on this round.

assertions.details: `bunx convex dev --once` completed successfully after the typecheck fixes landed, so the renamed schema now validates cleanly in Convex.
evidence: Convex printed `Convex functions ready!` after preparing functions in about five seconds.

commands.observation: Convex prepared functions and reported `Convex functions ready! (4.98s)`.

frictions: A Task-based flow-validator spawn was attempted first, but the Task tool still inherited the invalid model alias `custom:GPT-5.4-(xHigh)-16`; the main worker completed the CLI validation directly instead.
